evidence.correctness_and_freshness: mercadopago.SDK(token), sdk.preference().create(), sdk.payment().get() are consistent with the current mercadopago-python SDK. currency_id ARS and action payment.updated are internally consistent. No version timestamp given but methods are self-consistent.
evidence.executability: Code parses, imports OK, env var name matches. However testing procedure mandates 'ngrok http 8000' which is a sandbox-infeasible pattern flagged by the harness, capping executability at 2.
evidence.completeness: (a) key acquisition with URL+menu present; (b) install bash present; (c) .env template with MP_ACCESS_TOKEN; (d) backend code complete; (e) frontend code complete; (f) test commands present but spread in prose rather than a single fenced test block. env vars match.
evidence.citation_anchoring: Only one link to developers.mercadopago.com.ar (dashboard, not docs path). No official docs URLs placed near code blocks; no canonical mercadopago docs page cited.

rubric_notes: ngrok in test procedure triggers sandbox cap. Docs unavailable; internal consistency is solid so correctness scored 4 under long-tail handling.
